procurement_note: Formal licitación pública managed by Municipio de Los Cabos. Oficio Taller provides technical review and recommendation. Contracting entity has sole authority for contractor selection per obra pública procurement rules.

bids.notes: Registered obra pública contractor, strong public works portfolio
Higher bid, faster timeline, also obra pública registered

recommendation_rationale: Two formal bids received satisfying the obra publica minimum bid requirement (minimum 2 bids per procurement rules). Constructora Municipal BCS SA submitted the lowest bid (MXN 18,500,000) with a 60-week construction timeline, meeting all obra publica contractor qualification requirements. Technical review confirms bid is complete and responsive to the technical specifications. Oficio Taller provides this as a technical recommendation — the contracting entity (Municipio de Los Cabos) retains sole authority for final contractor selection under applicable procurement law.
